strengths: 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure engineering
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial drive
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: Limited demonstrated AI/ML depth or shipped AI products at scale
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field

response.justification: The candidate brings strong, broad software craftsmanship over 15+ years with founder experience and recent hands-on work in AI-agent tooling, but the resume shows limited evidence of recognized AI expertise, large-scale AI products, or director-level strategic leadership expected for a Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy.
